import React from 'react'; import { Link } from 'react-router-dom'; import { useAuth } from '../services/authService'; const ActionCard = ({ to, icon, bgClass, title, description, buttonLabel, buttonClass }) => (
{icon}

{title}

{description}

{buttonLabel} ); const Dashboard = () => { const { user } = useAuth(); const isAdmin = user?.roles?.some(r => r.name === 'ROLE_ADMIN'); return (
{/* Hero Section */}

Welcome back

Hello, {user?.username} 👋

Your intelligent workspace for documents. Upload, manage, and share files with team members effortlessly.

{/* Quick Actions Grid */}

Quick Actions

} title="Upload Document" description="Securely upload files to your personal encrypted repository. Supported formats include PDF, DOCX, XLSX, and more." buttonLabel="Upload Now" buttonClass="text-accent-indigo" /> } title="My Documents" description="Browse, search, and manage all your documents. Download, share or delete files with one click." buttonLabel="View All" buttonClass="text-accent-cyan" /> {isAdmin && ( } title="Admin Console" description="Manage users, permissions, system settings, and monitor audit logs across the platform." buttonLabel="Open Console" buttonClass="text-accent-violet" /> )}
{/* Chat CTA */}

Team Messaging

Send files and messages to your teammates securely in real time.

Open Chat
); }; export default Dashboard;
